meta.title: Install Attestto — Digital ID Wallet
meta.description: Attestto Wallet. Your Digital ID, verifiable credentials, and legally binding document signing, on your phone. Installable as PWA on iOS, Android, and desktop. Apache 2.0.
meta.ogDescription: Digital ID, verifiable credentials, and legally binding document signing on your phone. Installable PWA. Open source.
meta.twitterDescription: Digital ID, verifiable credentials, and legally binding document signing on your phone. Installable PWA.

hero.desc: Your Digital ID, your verifiable credentials, and your document signing, on your phone. Your data on your device. No servers, no middlemen.
hero.phoneHint: The app is interactive: tap, navigate, and try it live
hero.scanQr: Scan the code with your phone

phaseStatus.label: Status: version 0.1.0
phaseStatus.text: Attestto Wallet is at version 0.1.0. Identity, credentials, and document signing work today. On-chain anchoring runs on Solana devnet while we complete the attestto-anchor service on Fly.io; keys never leave the citizen's device. Detailed status and roadmap at attestto.com/roadmap.
